name: Brandon Lee
about: 4 years in elevated menswear at Rag & Bone and Faherty. Retailers love his energy on the floor and ability to connect with younger male shoppers. Strong closer on leather goods.
interviewTranscript: Retail management has been my path—I've worked at several elevated brands and built my way up. I'm very experienced with sales floor operations, visual merchandising, and connecting with customers on a personal level. I pride myself on understanding what people are looking for before they even know it themselves. When it comes to menswear, I know what works and I'm confident making recommendations. My managers have always trusted me to handle VIP clients and high-pressure situations.
